---
title: "For vendors"
description: "Get your restaurant onto Rumizi: upload a menu, publish it, and share the QR code with your tables."
sidebarTitle: "Overview"

---

Welcome. This section walks you through running a Rumizi venue end to end —
from the first menu upload to billing. If you're brand new, start with **Set
up your first menu**; otherwise jump to the topic you need.

<Columns cols={2}>
  <Card title="Set up your first menu" icon="rocket" href="/vendors/first-menu">
    The fastest path from signup to a scannable QR menu on your tables.
  </Card>
  <Card title="Upload a menu file" icon="upload" href="/vendors/menu/upload">
    Turn a photo, PDF, or website into a structured menu with AI.
  </Card>
  <Card title="Edit your menu" icon="pencil" href="/vendors/menu/editing">
    Change names, prices, descriptions, photos, and modifiers.
  </Card>
  <Card title="Publish and preview" icon="eye" href="/vendors/menu/publish">
    How diners see changes, and how to preview before going live.
  </Card>
  <Card title="Translations" icon="language" href="/vendors/menu/translations">
    Offer your menu in multiple languages with one switcher.
  </Card>
  <Card title="Open hours" icon="clock" href="/vendors/menu/scheduling">
    Schedule lunch and dinner menus, or any other window.
  </Card>
  <Card title="Tags and filters" icon="tag" href="/vendors/menu/tags">
    Mark items as vegetarian, spicy, chef's pick, and let diners filter.
  </Card>
  <Card title="AI assistant" icon="sparkles" href="/vendors/assistant/overview">
    Let Rumizi Assistant help you build and manage your menu.
  </Card>
</Columns>

## The full flow

<Steps>
  <Step title="Sign up and claim your venue">
    Your workspace lives at `rumizi.com/your-venue/w`. You sign in with a
    magic link — no password to remember.
  </Step>
  <Step title="Upload your menu">
    Drop a photo, PDF, or a link to your existing menu page. See
    [Upload a menu file](/vendors/menu/upload).
  </Step>
  <Step title="Review and edit">
    Fix prices, group into categories, add photos, and mark items as
    vegetarian, new, or out of stock. See
    [Edit your menu](/vendors/menu/editing).
  </Step>
  <Step title="Publish">
    Nothing is visible to diners until you publish. See
    [Publish and preview](/vendors/menu/publish).
  </Step>
  <Step title="Print your QR code and go">
    Put the QR on tables, windows, and table tents. When someone scans, they
    land on your menu instantly.
  </Step>
</Steps>
